---
title: "SAINTexpress TIP49 comparison"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

report_label <- Sys.getenv("SAINTEXPRESS_REPORT_LABEL", "SAINTexpress TIP49 comparison")
native_file <- Sys.getenv("SAINTEXPRESS_NATIVE_LIST", "saintexpress-tip49-native/list.txt")
reference_file <- Sys.getenv("SAINTEXPRESS_REFERENCE_LIST", "saintexpress-tip49-reference/list.txt")

native <- read.delim(native_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
reference <- read.delim(reference_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

key_cols <- intersect(c("Bait", "Prey", "PreyGene"), intersect(names(native), names(reference)))
stopifnot(length(key_cols) > 0)

common_cols <- intersect(names(native), names(reference))
candidate_cols <- setdiff(common_cols, key_cols)

is_numeric_column <- function(x) {
  converted <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  non_empty <- !is.na(x) & x != ""
  any(non_empty) && all(!is.na(converted[non_empty]))
}

numeric_cols <- candidate_cols[
  vapply(native[candidate_cols], is_numeric_column, logical(1)) &
    vapply(reference[candidate_cols], is_numeric_column, logical(1))
]

native_numeric <- native[c(key_cols, numeric_cols)]
reference_numeric <- reference[c(key_cols, numeric_cols)]

for (column in numeric_cols) {
  native_numeric[[column]] <- as.numeric(native_numeric[[column]])
  reference_numeric[[column]] <- as.numeric(reference_numeric[[column]])
}

comparison <- merge(
  reference_numeric,
  native_numeric,
  by = key_cols,
  suffixes = c("_reference", "_native")
)

summary_table <- data.frame(
  metric = numeric_cols,
  n = integer(length(numeric_cols)),
  correlation = numeric(length(numeric_cols)),
  mean_abs_delta = numeric(length(numeric_cols)),
  max_abs_delta = numeric(length(numeric_cols))
)

for (i in seq_along(numeric_cols)) {
  metric <- numeric_cols[[i]]
  reference_values <- comparison[[paste0(metric, "_reference")]]
  native_values <- comparison[[paste0(metric, "_native")]]
  complete <- complete.cases(reference_values, native_values)
  delta <- native_values[complete] - reference_values[complete]
  summary_table$n[[i]] <- sum(complete)
  summary_table$correlation[[i]] <- if (sum(complete) > 1) {
    cor(reference_values[complete], native_values[complete])
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }
  summary_table$mean_abs_delta[[i]] <- mean(abs(delta))
  summary_table$max_abs_delta[[i]] <- max(abs(delta))
}
```

## Inputs

`r report_label`

```{r}
data.frame(
  file = c(native_file, reference_file),
  rows = c(nrow(native), nrow(reference)),
  columns = c(ncol(native), ncol(reference))
)
```

Joined rows: `r nrow(comparison)`

Join columns: `r paste(key_cols, collapse = ", ")`

Compared numeric columns: `r paste(numeric_cols, collapse = ", ")`

## Numeric Summary

```{r}
summary_table
```

## Scatterplots

```{r, results='asis', fig.width=5.5, fig.height=5.5}
for (metric in numeric_cols) {
  reference_col <- paste0(metric, "_reference")
  native_col <- paste0(metric, "_native")
  plot_data <- comparison[complete.cases(comparison[c(reference_col, native_col)]), ]
  range_values <- range(c(plot_data[[reference_col]], plot_data[[native_col]]), finite = TRUE)

  cat("###", metric, "\n\n")
  print(
    ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = .data[[reference_col]], y = .data[[native_col]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linewidth = 0.4) +
      coord_equal(xlim = range_values, ylim = range_values) +
      labs(
        x = "Reference binary",
        y = "Native CMake build",
        title = metric
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  )
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
